ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-11-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-08-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, AUBRIE $1,272.90 PRINCIPAL, $240.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,513.40, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-08-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
